message:
🌱 Add argo-rollouts: Add an option to proceed to the next rollout step based on mission (#1220)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-rollouts-3991-add-an-option-to-proceed-to-the-next-rollout-step-based-on-a-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-rollouts: Add an option to proceed to the next rollout step based on a percentage of available replicas",
+    "description": "Add an option to proceed to the next rollout step based on a percentage of available replicas. Requested by 17+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-rollouts deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-rollouts version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nhelm list -n argo-rollouts 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-rollouts installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-rollouts configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts\n```\nAdd an option to allow Argo Rollouts to proceed to the next step in a rollout even if the desired replica count has not been fully achieved. Instead, allow progression based on a predefined percentage of the new ReplicaSet’s replicas being available."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add an option to proceed to the next rollout step based on…",
+        "description": "## Context\nAs of the date of writing this PR, whenever you want to promote your canary for each and every step, Argo Rollouts waits for the number of available pods grow and equal the *exact* number of desired pods that the step calls for. For example...\n1. Argo Rollouts sees that the canary is\n```yaml\nfunc allDesiredAreAvailable(rs *appsv1.ReplicaSet, desired int32) bool {\n    return rs != nil && desired == *rs.Spec.Replicas && desired == rs.Status.AvailableReplicas\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add an option to proceed to the next rollout step based on…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Context\nAs of the date of writing this PR, whenever you want to promote your canary for each and every step, Argo Rollouts waits for the number of available pods grow and equal the *exact* number of desired pods that the step calls for. For example...\n1. Argo Rollouts sees that the canary is passing all metric checks, analysis runs, etc.\n2.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "func allDesiredAreAvailable(rs *appsv1.ReplicaSet, desired int32) bool {\n    return rs != nil && desired == *rs.Spec.Replicas && desired == rs.Status.AvailableReplicas\n}",
+        "strategy:\n  canary:\n    steps:\n      - setWeight: 50\n    progressThreshold: 90",
+        "- replicaProgressThreshold:\n    type: Percent\n    value: 85"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-rollouts",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-rollouts"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Replicaset"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/issues/3991",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/pull/4341"
+    },
+    "reactions": 17,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-rollouts installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
